name: wallet-app
description: 💸WALLET — personal finance tracker with auth and backend

scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=frontend && npm run build --workspace=backend
scripts.prod:build: npm install --include=dev && npm run deploy:prep && npm run build
scripts.vercel-build: npm run db:generate:prod --workspace=backend && npm run db:push:prod --workspace=backend && npm run build
